Virtual Adoptions!
Animal Defenders for Life · South Pelion, Greece

This is a great opportunity to support our shelter... You can now virtually adopt the pet — or pets — of your choice for as little as €2 per month. This commitment will go towards their care and wellbeing. In return, you will receive regular photos, updates, and other shelter information. Just complete and send us the form below and we will be in touch.

Meet the animals waiting for your support
